The area is usually described as being on the Upper West Side, but has been described as part of "Greater Harlem" due to a disputed claim that the Upper West Side goes no farther north than 110th Street. West Side (Manhattan): The West Side of Manhattan refers to the side of Manhattan Island which abuts the Hudson River and faces New Jersey.
